div.head: 227. Editorial Note
div.p:
On October 5 Vance Brand arrived in Argentina for the first of two trips which he undertook for the Export-Import Bank during the autumn of 1956 in order to assess Argentina’s economy and evaluate possible projects for which the $100 million Export-Import
Bank loan might be used. Documentation concerning Brand’s trip is in Department of State, Central Files 835.10 and 835.2614.
